test.command: docker compose exec funasr bash -c 'cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/ -x'

typecheck.command: docker compose exec funasr bash -c 'cd /app/backend && ty check .'

lint.command: docker compose exec funasr bash -c 'cd /app/backend && ruff check . && cd /app/frontend && pnpm check'

appliedUpdates.description: Added path traversal protection pattern to architecture.md — reusable security pattern for file-serving endpoints using pathlib.resolve() + relative_to().

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md already documents the convention that all env vars must be read through core/config.py Settings class.
Worker used module-level singleton pattern inconsistently vs deferred factory in db/migrate.py.
rejectedObservations.reason: acceptable inconsistency due to import ordering constraints, not systemic
